agentSpans.name: invoke_agent Strands Agents
agentSpans.input: You have access to weather and time tools. When asked about weather, use get_weather. When asked about time, use get_time. Be concise. Use the get_weather tool exactly once to get the weather in Tokyo.
agentSpans.output:
<thinking>The get_weather tool has returned the result for Tokyo. I can now report the weather to the User.</thinking>

The current weather in Tokyo is sunny with a temperature of 72F.
